Packet.Name: Prepare local infrastructure
Packet.Goal: Create a local-first project skeleton for BIM5D Cost-Schedule Matching.

NonGoals.Item: Do not implement business matching logic
Do not connect real FNSB databases
Do not create direct ModelElement to GESNNorm mapping

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Safety checks and backup scripts exist.
No BIM/KSI/GESN business logic is implemented.
Acceptance report records the user decision.

Packet.Name: Reference data governance
Packet.Goal: Prevent unsupported, invented, or LLM-generated classifier and normative data from becoming evidence for matching rules.

Scope.Item: Create source manifest and import log
Define No source — no rule policy

NonGoals.Item: Do not download external reference data
Do not invent KSI or GESN codes
Do not activate matching rules without evidence

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Source manifest and import log exist.
Missing evidence creates structured user questions.
No active matching rule is created without evidence.
Acceptance report records the user decision.

Packet.Name: Delta-based reference versioning
Packet.Goal: Represent reference releases as logical objects and revisions so unchanged records are not duplicated.

Scope.Item: Add fake fixtures for versioning checks
Track matching rule dependencies on reference object revisions

NonGoals.Item: Do not import real FSNB or KSI data
Do not create database migrations before database layer is ready
Do not duplicate unchanged reference records across releases

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Fake fixtures demonstrate added, changed, deleted, and unchanged records.
No real KSI/FSNB/GESN data is imported.
Acceptance report records the user decision.

Packet.Name: Project planning and acceptance contour
Packet.Goal: Create a local project planning, artifact registry, traceability, status reporting, and user acceptance workflow.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: в AGENTS.md добавлена Project planning and acceptance discipline.
validate_project_plan.py проверяет существование путей из artifact-registry.yml.
Codex не ставит accepted, только ready_for_acceptance.

NonGoals.Item: Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not mark any packet accepted
Do not invent normative data

Packet.Name: Acceptance and user action dashboards
Packet.Goal: Create local Markdown and YAML dashboards for packet acceptance, user actions, and accepted artifact protection.

Scope.Item: Create acceptance dashboard Markdown and YAML files
Create user action dashboard Markdown and YAML files
Extend project plan validation for dashboards and accepted artifact protection
Document dashboard and accepted artifact protection discipline

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: ready_for_acceptance packets отражаются в acceptance dashboard.
open questions отражаются в user action dashboard.
accepted_by / decided_by не может быть Codex.
добавлены команды генерации dashboards в Makefile.
protected accepted artifacts нельзя изменять без user approval.
если требуется изменение accepted artifact, создается requires_user_approval action или change request.

NonGoals.Item: Do not create web UI, frontend dashboard, or backend dashboard endpoints
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not mark any packet accepted
Do not change accepted artifacts without explicit user approval

Packet.Name: Verification dashboard
Packet.Goal: Create a local manual verification window for testing protocol checks without web UI.

Scope.Item: Create verification dashboard Markdown and YAML files
Connect verification dashboard with monthly test protocol
Extend project plan validation for verification checks

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: verification dashboard содержит проверки из протокола тестирования.
manual checks не могут быть отмечены Codex как passed.
verification dashboard связан с acceptance dashboard и monthly test protocol.

NonGoals.Item: Do not create web UI, frontend, or backend endpoints
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not mark manual checks as passed by Codex
Do not mark any packet accepted

Packet.Name: Dissertation prompt generation contour
Packet.Goal: Create a controlled pipeline from Tartip changes to dissertation impact analysis, generated prompts, markdown patches, user acceptance, and explicit DOCX updates.

Scope.Item: Create dissertation synchronization folders and guardrails
Create dissertation editor prompt profile and alignment rules
Create prompt templates for impact, section, terminology, bibliography, and DOCX update checks
Create prompt generation and validation scripts

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Codex не создает новую версию DOCX.
статус EP-008 — ready_for_acceptance, но не accepted.
accepted artifacts не изменяются без user approval.

NonGoals.Item: Do not edit DOCX directly
Do not create a new DOCX version
Do not invent sources or bibliography entries
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not mark any packet, prompt, patch, or DOCX update accepted

Packet.Name: Codex specification audit and language policy
Packet.Goal: Create an audit-first contour for Codex project rules, artifact protection, dashboards, and Russian user-facing language policy.

Scope.Item: Create codex spec audit profile and report
Create language policy and language audit report
Create audit scripts and validation script
Register audit artifacts and update dashboards

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: аудит проверяет отсутствие duplicate packet ids.
языковой аудит не переводит технические идентификаторы.
audit scripts preserve existing user resolutions in audit-findings.yml.
language audit does not fail on technical identifiers.
EP-009 does not mass-rewrite existing documents.
medium/low language findings do not block make check.

NonGoals.Item: Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not create direct ModelElement to GESNNorm mapping
Do not mass-russify existing documents
Do not modify accepted/protected artifacts without user approval
Do not mark any packet accepted

Packet.Name: Git workflow discipline
Packet.Goal: Create formal rules and validation checks for branch creation, current branch continuation, merge readiness, merge prohibitions, and forbidden Git files.

Scope.Item: Add Git workflow discipline to AGENTS.md
Extend Codex spec audit with Git workflow checks

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: forbidden files не должны попадать в Git.

NonGoals.Item: Do not perform merge
Do not perform git add, commit, push, or branch deletion
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not mark EP-011 accepted
Do not add secrets, dumps, real DOCX/PDF, or real normative bases to Git

Packet.Name: User review workbench and acceptance standard
Packet.Goal: Create one active user review workbench and define the empty blockers/risks standard for acceptance reports.

Scope.Item: Add acceptance blockers and risks format to AGENTS.md
Add user review workbench discipline to AGENTS.md
Update acceptance report template with empty blockers/risks rules
Create user review workbench Markdown and YAML files
Create generator, validator, and safe decision application scripts
Register artifacts and update project planning files

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: AGENTS.md содержит стандарт пустых разделов "Блокеры" и "Риски".
ACCEPTANCE_TEMPLATE.md содержит правила заполнения блокеров и рисков.
accepted packets не отображаются в active_review_items.
решения пользователя из workbench применяются только через apply_user_review_decisions.py.
Codex не может сам ставить accepted/accepted_by/accepted_at.
acceptance reports остаются source of truth.

NonGoals.Item: Do not execute EP-010-LANGUAGE-NORMALIZATION
Do not normalize README.md or CHANGELOG.md
Do not automatically accept EP-003 through EP-011
Do not replace acceptance reports as source of truth
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not run git add, commit, merge, push, or rebase

Packet.Name: Post-acceptance state sync
Packet.Goal: Synchronize project registries, dashboards, and status documents after the accepted acceptance cycle.

Scope.Item: Reflect accepted packets from acceptance reports in execution packet statuses
Update project plan and status report to accepted_baseline with EP-013 as active packet
Update acceptance dashboard and user review workbench generation for post-acceptance state
Document follow-up debt for artifact protection, verification reconciliation, reference intake, and audit cleanup

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Все accepted acceptance reports отражены как accepted в execution-packets.xml.
Acceptance dashboard не показывает один и тот же принятый набор EP как ready_for_acceptance и accepted одновременно.
EP-001..EP-012 отсутствуют в active acceptance queue.
EP-013 отображается как текущий ready_for_acceptance packet.
Verification checks остаются открытым post-acceptance debt и не закрываются Codex.
Audit finding statuses не меняются EP-013.
EP-006 orphan/monthly verification scope вынесен в follow-up EP-015.
Accepted artifact protection flags не включаются массово и вынесены в EP-014.

NonGoals.Item: Do not change accepted reports EP-001 through EP-012
Do not close verification checks or user actions
Do not change audit finding statuses
Do not mass-enable protection flags
Do not change BIM-KSI-GESN domain methodology
Do not add reference or normative data
Do not create or edit DOCX/PDF files
